data.name: Making Memories
data.detailed_description:
段尚未開始的旅程, 一個業已降臨的謊言——你和你的女兒都因生活中忽然的變故而痛苦不堪。

這個故事是關於一個面臨背叛的男人, 但不僅僅是你, 還有你的女兒——她對「幸福家庭」的印象在瞬間被粉碎了。

Xiomara

是一個有抱負的電影製作人, 一位後起之秀；她的事業因她專業的攝影技術蒸蒸日上。她過去就對你有好感, 但直到最近才發生了變化, ——很大、很大的變化……

Ava

是全國最知名的律師之一, 她的職業讓她積累了很多財富, 但同時也讓她孤身一人、居無定所。但這不是她一直單身的唯一原因, 她對你的感情也是原因之一。這段感情可以追溯到你們非常卑微的開始, 可以追溯到你們的內心深處；她也知道這種感覺在一定程度上是相互的。


And

你/(Alvaro)

是一個頭腦清醒的中年男人, 當生活向你襲來時, 你能掌控它, 尤其是當它涉及到你的女兒時。

做她的王, 或者做她的王子。

Developer's Notes

Making Memories 是一部以故事和情感為主的小說, 專註於深入挖掘角色的內心世界。需要說明的是, 這種遊戲類型中純粹肉欲的數量從來都不是我打算在這部小說中探討的——就像其他遊戲已經做到的那樣, 但它完全存在!
這是一部通過分支事件告訴你更多關於我們的角色和他們生活的世界的視覺小說——這只是一個開始!

你/(Alvaro)

是一個頭腦清醒的中年男人, 當生活向你襲來時, 你能掌控它, 尤其是當它涉及到你的女兒時。

Making Memories 是一部以故事和情感為主的小說, 專註於深入挖掘角色的內心世界。需要說明的是, 這種遊戲類型中純粹肉欲的數量從來都不是我打算在這部小說中探討的——就像其他遊戲已經做到的那樣, 但它完全存在!
這是一部通過分支事件告訴你更多關於我們的角色和他們生活的世界的視覺小說——這只是一個開始!
data.short_description: 部精心製作的視覺小說。一個關於性、浪漫、友誼、治愈和繼續前進的故事, 在長大成人的過程中變得成熟、穩重。希望能給某人帶來快樂。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo (64 bit only)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Making Memories
data.detailed_description:
A trip not taken, a lie befallen - as you and your ward are both traumatized by a sudden change in your lives.

The story is about a man facing betrayal, but it's not just you, but also your daughter - whose image of this "Perfect Family" has been shattered within moments.

Xiomara

is an up-and-comer aspiring filmmaker who's climbing her way up through professional photography.
She has had a crush on you since who knows, but only recently has it changed something more, - much, much more...

Ava

is amongst the country's most well-known lawyers and has earned a lot of wealth but her profession has left her alone and constantly moving, but that's not the only reason she has been alone this whole time, but her feeling towards you too, which go back to both of your very humble beginnings and deep down, even she knows that the feelings are somewhat mutual.


And

You/(Alvaro)

are a middle-aged man with a good head on your shoulders, navigating life as it throws itself at you, especially when it comes to your daughter.

To be her King or to be her Prince.

Developer's Notes

Making Memories is a story and emotion first novel with focus on deep dive in their psyche, and while not an afterthought, the amount of purely carnal aspects of the genre was never my intention to explore in this novel - as other games have already done it, but it's fully there!
This is a Kinectic-ish Visual novel with branching events that tells you more about our characters, and the world they live in - this is just the beginning!

are a middle-aged man with a good head on your shoulders, navigating life as it throws itself at you, especially when it comes to your daughter.

This is a Kinectic-ish Visual novel with branching events that tells you more about our characters, and the world they live in - this is just the beginning!
data.short_description: A Visual novel made from the heart. Experience, and expect the "Mature" in Maturity, A story about Sex, Romance, friendship, healing, and moving on. Made to put a smile on one's face.
data.supported_languages: English, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
